name: Adamantine Bracers
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Cold Iron Bracers 

These heavy bracers are made of Adamantine and can withstand heavy blows.

name: Admiral's Wristwatch
description:
This bracer features a small watch and an intricate compass sewn into the lining.
It's perfect for finding your way in the storms.

name: Aetherband
description: Wrap magic itself around your wrists.

name: Aosu'riel's Bracers
description: The Archon Aosu'riel wore these into battle. Treat them with care.

name: Aquatic Bracers (historic)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 12)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 13)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 14)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 23)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 24)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Aquatic Bracers (Level 25)
description:
These bracers are crafted from a very lightweight metal, and sport fin-like
protrusions on their sides.

name: Arm of the Aggressor
description:
Brought from Argonessen, this armband once belonged to a notable Dragonborn
warlord.
dropLocation: Riding the Storm Out, Warded chest

name: Armbands of the Silenced Ones
description:
On the plane of battle, quiet can be one's biggest asset. If your soldiers will
not provide it willingly, take matters into your own hands.

name: Auspicious Bracers
description:
Charms of good fortune have been worked into the surface of these bracers. Do
they work? Time will tell.

name: Axe Bane
description: This pair of simple leather bracers glow faintly of magic.

name: Band of Diani ir'Wynarn
description:
Thrane is proud of the reputation of Flamekeep, and this bracelet is as radiant
as the city itself.
dropLocation: Project Nemesis, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any legendary Sharn quest

name: Barbarian's Spirit
description: These bracers allow their user to periodically mimic a barbarian's frenzy.

name: Barbette's Bracers
description:
Shoved below deck, the Barbettes held though, their aim true, manning the cannons
with the utmost bravery.

name: Berserker Bracers
description: Imposing steel bands worn around the forearms of formidable Minotaur Berserkers.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Bete Noir
description:
Bracers from a silver flame paladin, the holy symbols scratched out and covered
with the eye of the abbot.

name: Black Opal Bracers
description:
These clasps feature a stunning black opal set prominently within them, surrounded
by a decorative silver lattice.

name: Black Widow Bracers
description:
Crafted from the chitinous shell of giant black widow spiders, these bracers
provide excellent defense versus physical attacks.

name: Blademaster Bracers
description: These bracers are crafted for powerful hobgoblin warriors known as Blademasters.

name: Bloodbark Bracers
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Vinelash Bracers 

Living, sharp, and bloody vines are wound around the wrists of these wooden
bracers.

name: Bodysnatcher's Bracers
description: Standard issue for working the graveyard shift.
dropLocation: Beneath the City Streets, end chest

name: Bracelet of Madness
description:
This bracelet enhances your spellcasting power, but it seems to whisper to you,
urging you to seek out other items touched by Xoriat. Wear it with other items
affected by the Plane of Madness to gain further power.

name: Bracelets of Flourishing Fauna
description:
Elven Druids of old wore these as a symbol of their connection to the world
around them.

name: Bracelets of Subtle Life
description:
Deep in the halls of the Temple, in the corners forgotten, grows a quiet hope
grows in response.
dropLocation: ToEE: Depths of the Temple, end chest

name: Bracers of Assistance
description: This pair of simple leather bracers glow faintly of magic.

name: Bracers of Deftness
description: These bracers feature a cresting wave on the side of them.
dropLocation: The Chamber of Raiyum, chest in the treasure chamber in the center of the tomb's lowest floor

name: Bracers of Method and Magic
description: Arcane runes flow along the edges of this finely-crafted item.

name: Bracers of Order and Chaos
description:
A set of Bracers: One glowing faintly with the light of Order, the other smouldering
in Chaos.

name: Bracers of Spiderkind
description: These drow-made bracers feature cobwebs and spider designs sewn into the leather.

name: Bracers of the Battlerager
description: Bearing the mark of the Eternal Brigade, these bracers offer unparalleled protection.
dropLocation: Threats Old and New, Raid Warded chest

name: Bracers of the Claw
description:
Drow warriors don these bracers before combat and are granted great power in
battle. They claim the bracers are infused with Vulkoor's Wrath.

name: Bracers of the Demon's Consort
description:
These jagged, spiked leather bracers are covered in barbs and wicked-looking
blades that protrude from the wrists and forearms.

name: Bracers of the Eagle
description: Wearing these bracers, you feel like taking flight.

name: Bracers of the Fallen Hero
description: These must have belonged to someone else before you.
dropLocation: A Raven at the Door, End chest, Rescue Yesper from the Dungeons optional chest

name: Bracers of the Fox
description: Wearing these bracers makes you feel clever.

name: Bracers of the Glacier
description:
Crafted by the great wizard Telios, these bracers are said to have been crafted
from the flesh of Frost Giants. Telios disappeared recently, after being asked
by members of the twelve to investigate the ruins beneath Stormreach. There
is said to be a matching pair of gloves to these bracers.
dropLocation: A Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Bracers of the Hidden Blade
description:
Once used in a failed assassination attempt against a Giant chieftain that resided
here. Perhaps your fate will be better than theirs.

name: Bracers of the Hunter
description:
Powerful shamans and clerics of Vulkoor work together to create these scorpion-shell
bracers to honor a clan's favored hunters. Although rare even among the drow
tribes, a few pairs of these bracers have made their way into the hands of
explorers, often through deadly combat with the chosen of Vulkoor.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Drow Area: Wokran-Kull 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Bracers of the Mountain
description: Strong like Stone, but they don't seem to weigh anything.

name: Bracers of the Owl
description: Small feathers line the interior.

name: Bracers of the Sun and Moon
description:
A set of bracers: One glowing faintly with a white light and one seemingly sucking
in all light around it into darkness.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End chest
_file: Bracers of the Sun and Moon.item

name: Bracers of the Sun Soul
description:
The Order of the Sun Soul is a monastic order dedicated to the welfare of the
common folk of FaerÃ»n. These bracers are designed to allow an unarmed warrior
to safely parry or deflect enemy blows.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Villagers of Eveningstar Commendation: Villagers of Eveningstar : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Villagers of Eveningstar. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Bracers of the Unseen Assassin
description:
An assassin's job is to remain silent, and Elven assassins took that charge
seriously.

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 16)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Heroic Normal)

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 17)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Heroic Hard)

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 18)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Heroic Elite)

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 23)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Epic), Netherese Legacy chain end reward

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 24)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Epic Hard)

name: Bracers of Twisting Shade (Level 25)
description:
These leather bracers will slightly dim any source of light they are brought
close to.
dropLocation: A Stay at the Inn, End chest (Epic Elite)

name: Bracers of Wind (level 11)
description:
Bracers empowered by a bound Air Elemental. They surround you with a windy aura
that deflects missiles occasionally, makes you harder to hit, and boosts the
power of your electric spells.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Bracers of Wind (level 15)
description:
Bracers empowered by a bound Air Elemental. They surround you with a windy aura
that deflects missiles occasionally, makes you harder to hit, and boosts the
power of your electric spells.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Bracers of Wind (level 3)
description:
Bracers empowered by a bound Air Elemental. They surround you with a windy aura
that deflects missiles occasionally, makes you harder to hit, and boosts the
power of your electric spells.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Bracers of Wind (level 7)
description:
Bracers empowered by a bound Air Elemental. They surround you with a windy aura
that deflects missiles occasionally, makes you harder to hit, and boosts the
power of your electric spells.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Cannith Crafted Bracers
description: This is a Cannith crafted pair of bracers.

name: Brand of Kalok Shash
description: This painful brand of the Demon Wastes grants you incredible power.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, end chest; Masterminds of Sharn saga: Epic end reward; rare drop in any legendary Sharn quest

name: Brightlord, the Sigil of the Flame
description:
This single bracer contains a variant of the symbol of The Silver Flame. It's
likely to be useful to any Paladin, although true devotion is always well rewarded...
dropLocation: The Lost Gatekeepers, any legendary chest
_file: Brightlord, the Sigil of the Flame.item

name: Brilliant Bracer
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Bronzed Bracers
description: Heavy bronze makes a mighty defensive tool.
dropLocation: Fall of the Forbidden Temple, end chest

name: Burning Manacles
description: Only those who can endure the pain are worthy of the power.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest

name: Chaosgarde
description:
This set of polished silver bracers is stamped with a mark of True Law. They
look slightly damaged from prior battles.
dropLocation: The Xorian Cipher, Green Key Room

name: Charm Bracelet
description: Charming in its own way, it takes the allure of other charms away.

name: Circlet of Silver Flame
description: This white gold bracelet is formed from flame shaped links.

name: Cliffdiver Luck Charms
description:
Intertwined strands of brightly-colored seaweed make for a simple yet beautiful
adornments.
dropLocation: Cult of the Six, End reward

name: Cold Iron Bracers
description: These heavy bracers are made of Cold Iron and can withstand heavy blows.
dropLocation: Immortality Lessons, End chest, 'Granny' Optional Chest

name: Construct Champion's Bands
description:
These bands are relatively uncomfortable for those who weren't built with their
use in mind.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End chest

name: Corsair's Cufflinks
description: Fancy cufflinks! The sign of a pirate with a sense of fashion.

name: Crystalline Wristlet
description: Made of pure crystal, this mysterious bangle holds off many ills.

name: Cuffs of the Forbidden
description: Those trusted with secret knowledge wore these as a mark of their trusted position.
dropLocation: Voices of the Dead, end chest

name: Defensive Wrists
description: These will help you take some extra hits in the thick of battle.

name: Devilscale Bracers
description:
Crafted of the scales of a Horned Devil, this sturdy pair of bracers will magically
enhance your ability to strike your enemies.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Dinosaur Bone Bracers
description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: The Isle of Dread, any legendary chest; or Dread saga legendary end reward

name: Dissolution
description:
Made from the carapace of a fiendish worm, these bracers still ooze with strange
acidic liquids.
dropLocation: Defiler of the Just, Warded chest

name: Doctor Vulcana's Broken Wristwatch
description:
This intricate wristwatch is powered by some unseen magical energy, and contains
intriciate detail that belies incredible worth. Its glass face is shattered,
and although you've tried your best to clean it, dried blood lingers in the
cracks.
dropLocation: The Soul Splitter, any legendary end chest

name: Driftwood Bracers
description: Occasionally, sea and time align to create something both functional and elegant.
dropLocation: Rest for the Night, end chest

name: Dumathoin's Bracers
description:
"Hold the gates! No green-skin will step one foot into Thunderholme!"
- Dumathoin Thunderstone, Captain of the Guard
dropLocation: Temple of the Deathwyrm, Raid chest

name: Epic Armbands of the Silenced Ones
description:
On the plane of battle, quiet can be one's biggest asset. If your soldiers will
not provide it willingly, take matters into your own hands.
_file: Epic Armbands of the Silenced Ones.item

name: Epic Barbette's Bracer
description:
Shoved below deck, the Barbettes held tough, their aim true, manning the cannons
with the utmost bravery.

name: Epic Bracers of Deftness
description: These bracers feature a cresting wave on the side of them.
dropLocation: Epic version of Bracers of Deftness

name: Epic Bracers of the Claw
description:
Drow warriors don these bracers before combat and are granted great power in
battle. They claim the bracers are infused with Vulkoor's wrath.
dropLocation: Epic version of Bracers of the Claw

name: Epic Bracers of the Demon's Consort
description:
These jagged, spiked leather bracers are covered in barbs and wicked-looking
blades that protrude from the wrists and forearms.
dropLocation: Epic version of Bracers of the Demon's Consort
_file: Epic Bracers of the Demon's Consort.item

name: Epic Bracers of the Hunter
description:
Powerful shamans and clerics of Vulkoor work together to create these scorpion-shell
bracers to honor a clan's favored hunters. Although rare even among the drow
tribes, a few pairs of these bracers have made their way into the hands of
explorers, often through deadly combat with the chosen of Vulkoor.
dropLocation: Epic version of Bracers of the Hunter

name: Epic Bracers of Wind
description:
Bracers empowered by a bound Air Elemental. They surround you with a windy aura
that deflects missiles occasionally, makes you harder to hit, and boosts the
power of your electric spells.
dropLocation: Vaults of the Artificers, Turn in various ingredients

name: Epic Driftwood Bracers
description: Occasionally, sea and time align to create something both functional and elegant.

name: Epic Ethereal Bracers
description:
These bracers seem to be slightly blurry and somewhat translucent. When the
bracers are equipped these properties are transferred to the wearer's hands
and weapons allowing incorporeal creatures to be easily hit as well as granting
some defensive benefits.

name: Epic Inferno Bracers
description:
These dark charcoal bracers were made of metal infused with the ashes of Cinnis'
mortal elemental body.
dropLocation: Inferno of the Damned (epic), End chest

name: Epic Iron Manacles
description:
These manacles once bound the hands of common criminals. Their souls remain
trapped inside the wrought-iron bands.

name: Epic Jidz-Tet'ka
description:
Thri-kreen runes carved into these chitin bracers read 'The shell of the seeker
of enlightenment.'

name: Epic Kundarak Warding Bracers
description:
These bracers are Kundarak-forged for dwarven guardians, but most races can
wear them.
dropLocation: Epic version of Kundarak Warding Bracers

name: Epic Saltiron Bracer
description: Smiths in Saltmarsh are known for their craft in iron.

name: Epic Scorched Bracers
description:
A pair of bracers that guards the wearer against magic flames. They seem to
have been tested vigorously until the protection was perfected.

name: Epic Silver Flame Bracers
description: These golden bracers are emblazoned with flame-shaped symbols.
dropLocation: Setting the Wards: The Lower Cathedral, End Chest

name: Epic Wand Bracelet
description:
A special bracelet that can store wands and scrolls. It will take on the properties
of an item you fuse with it, and allow you to activate similar abilities daily.

name: Ethereal Bracers
description:
These bracers seem to be slightly blurry and somewhat translucent. When the
bracers are equipped these properties are transferred to the wearer's hands
and weapons allowing incorporeal creatures to be easily hit as well as granting
some defensive benefits.

name: Fabricator's Bracers
description:
Fabricators of House Cannith wear sturdy bracers like these to protect them
from the dangerous machinery they work with.
dropLocation: Blown to Bits, Iron Fire Bomber 's chest

name: Falrinth's Folly
description:
Falrinth believed so strongly that nothing could stop his plan, he became blind
to his own fate in it.
dropLocation: ToEE: Lower Temple Complex, end chest

name: Fiendblood Bracers
description:
These look a little familiar, almost like you've seen them somewhere else before...
But, well, with less blood.

name: Ghastly Guards
description:
You can see through the material of these bracers. Blows seem to slide around
them.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part Two), Gallows Speakers chest

name: Golden Glittering Bangle
description: Subtle as smoke

name: Green Dragonscale Bracers
description:
These bracers are crafted out of Green Dragonscale, carry an incredible magical
energy within.
dropLocation: Needle in a Fey Stack, End chest

name: Green Steel Bracers
description: Bracers with green steel plates.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Grym's Bone Bracers
description:
Grym wore these bones on his head as a crown, but they make a fine bracer to
guard your wrists.

name: Guardian's Bracers (Level 15)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Guardian's Bracers (Level 26)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

name: Hallowed Castigators
description: Shines in the moonlight with radiant energies.

name: Hidden Armlets
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .

description: Heavy and able to take a few hits for you.

name: Kopru Bracers

name: Legendary Jidz-Tet'ka

Thri-kreen runes carved into these chitin bracers read 'The shell of the seeker

name: Legendary Kopru Bracers
description: Kopru are capricious, evil creatures. Treat this item with care.
dropLocation: Bullywugs and Booby Traps, end chest

name: Legendary Kundarak Warding Bracers
description:
These bracers are Kundarak-forged for dwarven guardians, but most races can
wear them.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Kundarak Warding Bracers

name: Legendary Levik's Bracers
description:
This relic of the Silver Flame was supposedly once worn by the powerful paladin
Levik. Levik and his brother Lorrik disappeared many years ago while investigating
tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Legendary Lore-Fueled Packbanner
description:
Tie this around your paws and feel the spirit of the wilds course through your
veins.
dropLocation: An Invitation to Dinner, End chest + some other chests

name: Legendary Magewright's Toolkit
description:
A full kit of tools normally used by a Magewright attached to a leather bracer
for ease of carrying.

name: Legendary Manacles of Justice
description: In a pinch, they can function as handcuffs for any neer-do-wells you encounter.
dropLocation: Order in the Court!, end chest

name: Legendary Moonrise Bracers
description: Balance in all things.
dropLocation: Reach for the Sky, End Chest

name: Legendary Mystic Wrappings
description:
Found in the Giantish ruins and imbued with dragonscales, these scraps of cloth
imbue great arcane power when wrapped around the forearms.

name: Legendary Necromancer's Bracers
description:
These are attuned to necromantic energies, and can protect from physical blows
in a pinch.

name: Legendary Palescale Bracers
description: Almost opalescent, the scales along these bracers feel freezing to the touch.

name: Legendary Saltiron Bracer
description: Smiths in Saltmarsh are known for their craft in iron.
dropLocation: What Sleeps Below, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Saltiron Bracer

name: Legendary Scarlet Scale Bracers
description:
These scales don't have the same power as true Red Dragonscales, but lingering
Transmutation magic has left them useful nonetheless.

name: Legendary Scorched Bracers
description:
A pair of bracers that guards the wearer against magic flames. They seem to
have been tested vigorously until the protection was perfected.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Scorched Bracers

name: Legendary Shackles
description: To hold one back, is to give them strength through freedom.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, Small chest, End chest

name: Legendary Sunken Chains
description: Heavy and rusted.

name: Legendary Surreptitious Shackles
description:
On closing the shackle, a memory flashes by: A form that isn't your own, breaking
free from your bonds, your desire for revenge insatiable.

name: Legendary Tharne's Bracers
description:
This pair of bracers was once worn by Tharne. These bracers are scarred from
a variety of weapons, and are said to match a pair of goggles that he discovered
during his adventures.
dropLocation: Legendary Vision of Destruction, End chest

name: Legendary Vambrace of the Summer Court
description:
These bracers are modeled after the patrons of Queen Titania herself, and bear
a remnant of her magics.
_file: Legendary Vambrace of the Summer Court.item

name: Legendary Vinelash Bracers
description:
Living, sharp, and thorny vines are wound around the wrists of these wooden
bracers.

name: Legendary Wind Howler Bracers
description:
These bracers were once worn by a harpy of the dangerous and elite Wind Howler
flight. They dramatically increase the wearer's aptitude with ranged weaponry.

name: Legendary Wintery Wrappings
description: Cold doesn't perturb those wearing thick wrappings like these.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, end chest (rare)

name: Legendary World-Weary Wrappings
description:
No one is sure what these wrappings once held. But their power is immediately
evident.
dropLocation: The Evil We Know, End chest

name: Legendary Wristbound Register
description:
Popular among university scholars, a small compartment on this bracer opens
to reveal a small notebook.

name: Levik's Bracers
description:
This relic of the Silver Flame was supposedly worn by the powerful Paladin Levik.
Levik and his brother Lorrik disappeared many years ago when investigating
tales of an ancient creature residing beneath Stormreach.
dropLocation: Hound of Xoriat, Raid Warded Chest

name: Lore-Fueled Packbanner
description:
Tie this around your paws and feel the spirit of the wilds course through your
veins.
dropLocation: An Invitation to Dinner, End chest + some other chests

name: Magewright's Toolkit
description:
A full kit of tools used by a Magewright attached to a leather bracer for ease
of carrying.

name: Manacles of Ceaseless Toil (historic)
description:
These cuffs were symbols of authority given to the overseers of elven slave-bands.
Bolstered by potent, compulsory magic, the cuff-wearers guided intricate work
for weeks on end without complaint or loss of perception.

name: Thaarak Bracelet
description:
This ornament, adorned with a prominent green gem, will empower it's wearer
with many of the qualities of dreaded Thaarak Hounds, like their tough skin
the ability to breath deadly acid.

description:

a variety of weapons, and are said to match a pair of goggles that he discovered
during his adventures.

description: One of these bracers is attuned to flame, and the other to the cold.

description:

name: Ventilated Armbands
description:
These bracers have the unique feature of having air vents cut into their sides
to allow your arms to breathe. This makes nerve wracking procedures (such as
disarming a bomb) much less sweat inducing.
dropLocation: The Fall of Truth, Raid Warded chest (Epic Normal)
